summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PCM Industrial Maintenance Management System. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), but critical frontend SelectItem component error prevents full application functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem component has empty string value prop causing runtime crash
ui_bugs.error_message: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string. This is because the Select value can be set to an empty string to clear the selection and show the placeholder.
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents navigation to multiple pages and causes application crashes

integration_issues.issue: SelectItem error prevents navigation between pages

issues: Theme toggle button not found or not properly implemented

passed_tests: Equipamentos page loads and displays data (6 equipment items)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SelectItem component error by ensuring all SelectItem components have non-empty string value props. This error is preventing navigation to Ordens de Serviço, Planos Preventivos, Users, and Auditoria pages. The error occurs in React Select components where empty string values are not allowed.
